channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-15872] sanity-sec: test_31 'export for 10.240.41.112@tcp on MGS should not exist'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for paf <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/762fcac2-98bf-4291-bae1-fb46d50c70b0
Starting client trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-64vm2: -o user_xattr,flock trevis-64vm4@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-64vm2 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-64vm2
running=\$(mount | grep -c /mnt/lustre' ');
rc=0;
if [ \$running -eq 0 ] ; then
mkdir -p /mnt/lustre;
mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,flock trevis-64vm4@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre;
rc=\$?;
fi;
exit \$rc
Started clients trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-64vm2:
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-64vm2 mount | grep /mnt/lustre' '
10.240.41.115@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,checksum,flock,user_xattr,lruresize,lazystatfs,nouser_fid2path,verbose,encrypt)
10.240.41.115@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,checksum,flock,user_xattr,lruresize,lazystatfs,nouser_fid2path,verbose,encrypt)
CMD: trevis-64vm2 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/games:/snap/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4
trevis-64vm2: CMD: trevis-64vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-64vm2: CMD: trevis-64vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-64vm2: CMD: trevis-64vm3 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-64vm2: CMD: trevis-64vm2.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n version 2>/dev/null
trevis-64vm2: trevis-64vm2.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
CMD: trevis-64vm4 lctl get_param -n timeout
Using TIMEOUT=20
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-64vm2,trevis-64vm3,trevis-64vm4 [ -f /sys/module/mgc/parameters/mgc_requeue_timeout_min ] && echo 1 > /sys/module/mgc/parameters/mgc_requeue_timeout_min; exit 0
CMD: trevis-64vm4 lctl dl | grep ' IN osc ' 2>/dev/null | wc -l
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl dl | grep ' IN osc ' 2>/dev/null | wc -l
osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff9abd64174800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff9abd64174800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-ffff9abd64174800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0003-osc-ffff9abd64174800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0004-osc-ffff9abd64174800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0005-osc-ffff9abd64174800.idle_timeout=debug
osc.lustre-OST0006-osc-ffff9abd64174800.idle_timeout=debug
setting jobstats to procname_uid
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
Setting lustre.sys.jobid_var from disable to procname_uid
CMD: trevis-64vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl conf_param lustre.sys.jobid_var='procname_uid'
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
Waiting 90s for 'procname_uid'
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
CMD: trevis-64vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n jobid_var
Updated after 7s: want 'procname_uid' got 'procname_uid'
disable quota as required
item.summary: sanity-sec: test_31 'export for 10.240.41.112@tcp on MGS should not exist'

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
